tools.name: get_ticket
tools.description: Pull the full ticket record including subject, body, submitter email, and timestamps. Call this first to understand the issue.

tools.name: lookup_customer_by_email
tools.description: Find the customer account from an email address. Use the submitter email from the ticket to get the customer_id you need for all other tools.

email.description: Email address of the ticket submitter

tools.name: check_sso_config
tools.description: Read the SSO/SAML configuration: IdP provider, certificate expiry and upload dates, last successful authentication timestamp, and current error state. Always call this first for any SSO or login issue.

tools.name: check_audit_log
tools.description: Query the workspace event log. Use to verify when a plan changed, when SSO was configured, when a user's role was modified, or when any other workspace-level action occurred.

after.description: ISO 8601 date to filter events after, e.g. '2026-02-01'

tools.name: get_workspace_account_summary
tools.description: Get a summary of the workspace: seats used and limit, list of admins, SSO enabled/disabled status, and account creation date.

tools.name: list_workspace_users
tools.description: List all users in the workspace with their role and last login timestamp. Use to confirm how many users are affected by an SSO or permission issue, or to identify admins.

role.description: Optional: filter to a specific role

tools.name: modify_permissions
tools.description: Change a user's role. For role downgrades (e.g. admin → member), verify the request is from an authorized workspace admin before calling. Do not call this without confirming authorization in the ticket or audit log.

tools.name: reset_2fa
tools.description: Clear a user's 2FA enrollment. The user will be prompted to re-enroll on their next login. Use when a user is locked out due to a lost or inaccessible authenticator device.
